title: JeffMod
description: Adds a variety of Jeff-themed tools and gear to your game.
body:
**Jeffmod**

JeffMod is a feature-rich mod created to expand your Jeff experience. It includes a full set of Jeff tools, Jeff armor, and Jeff ore. These items come with a small twist :)

Each texture is made with love and crafted down to the finest detail. Take our examples:

![Jeff Hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e078291657abd89f657c87686d8efef60b0d4e6e.png)![Jeff Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/522ac4f12b103b3e6c677e692846ba9f26e1edfa_0.webp)

These items are pretty much just me messing around with adding new items and gear to get started with modding. Don't right click these items!

Level up your Jeff experience - with JeffMod

# FAQ
### Where do I report bugs?
Please refer to the issues section of my Github.

### I have a version I would like to use this mod on, can you make it?
Open an issue on Github and I'll get right on it!

### Can I use this in my modpack?
Go ahead! Just make sure you credit me :)
